The Gap

Human health solved this. Animal health hasn't.

Doceree, OptimizeRx, and Populus built a billion-dollar ecosystem connecting pharma to physicians at the point of care. The veterinary world has no equivalent — despite billions in pharma spend searching for a precision channel.

01

No digital POC channel for animal pharma

Zoetis, Elanco, Merck spend billions — with no way to reach vets at the prescribing moment, or pet owners during a vet visit.

02

Vet platforms are unmonetized digital real estate

PIMS and telehealth sit inside the clinical workflow all day with no pharma messaging infrastructure.

03

The supply side is ready. The network isn't.

Covetrus, ezyVet, Vetster — actively seeking monetization. Nobody has connected them to pharma brands yet.

Every species. Every clinic.
ScriptPaw reaches veterinarians across all practice types — small animal, equine, exotic, avian, and beyond.

The Platform

Precision engagement, inside the workflow.

ScriptPaw integrates directly into the platforms veterinarians use every day — PIMS, telehealth, and pet owner apps — delivering the right pharma message at the exact clinical moment.

1

Vet Platforms (Supply)

Covetrus, ezyVet, Vetster, Dutch — integrated via API, earning revenue share per campaign served.

2

ScriptPaw Precision Engine

Targeting by species, condition, brand, geography, and clinical context at the exact moment of decision.

3

Animal Pharma Brands (Demand)

Zoetis, Elanco, Merck, Boehringer — a precision digital channel in veterinary medicine, at last.

Supply Partner Platforms

The software already in every clinic.

ScriptPaw doesn't ask vets to change anything. We plug into the PIMS and telehealth platforms they already use — Covetrus, ezyVet, Provet Cloud, Vetster, Dutch — and serve precision pharma content at the point of clinical decision.

Become a Supply Partner
Why ScriptPaw

Built on a proven model. First to veterinary.

Our founding team spent 10+ years building this exact infrastructure in human health — at Doceree, ConnectiveRx, and Populus Health. We're replicating what already works in a market that has nothing yet.

🔗

Proven Playbook

The human health POC model works. We replicate it exactly in veterinary.

🎯

Precision Targeting

Species, condition, geography, and clinical context — exactly right, exactly when.

📈

Rx Lift Data

We measure prescription behavior change — the metric pharma actually pays for.

🔒

Network Moat

More supply → better targeting → more brands → more revenue. First mover wins.

For Animal Pharma Brands

Your audience, at the moment it matters.

  • Reach veterinarians at the exact prescribing moment — across all species
  • Target by species, condition, geography, and clinical context
  • Seasonal programs: flea/tick, heartworm, dermatology, oncology
  • DTC reach to pet owners via telehealth waiting rooms
  • First-party Rx lift data proving campaign effectiveness
Talk to Our Brand Team
For Vet Platform Partners

Turn your workflow into a revenue stream.

  • Monetize your clinical workflow — no disruption to user experience
  • Simple API integration with existing PIMS or telehealth
  • Revenue share on every campaign served through your platform
  • You control frequency caps and category exclusions
  • White-label options for enterprise vet groups
Become a Supply Partner
Campaign Performance

We don't just count impressions. We measure Rx lift.

Every campaign on the ScriptPaw network is measured against the metric pharma brands actually care about — prescription behavior change. Not clicks. Not views. Did the vet write the script?

📊

$18–28 CPM

Premium point-of-care rates. Vets are high-value, hard-to-reach. ScriptPaw makes them accessible.

💰

35% Rev Share

Supply partners earn 35% of every campaign. Real revenue for integrating with the network.

📈

~65% Gross Margin

Mirrors human health POC comps. The model is proven. The margin is built in.

🎯

$120K Avg Deal

Average annual brand client deal size. Seasonal campaigns stack throughout the year.

Our Team

Two friends. One shared conviction.

We met in a computer science classroom and went into healthcare IT — one into business development, one into technology. A decade later, we looked at veterinary medicine and saw the same infrastructure gap at the same moment. ScriptPaw is what happened next.

Saba Daniel
Co-Founder & Chief Revenue Officer

10+ years building EHR and telehealth supply partnerships at Doceree, ConnectiveRx, and Populus Health. Saba has spent her career connecting pharma brands to physicians at the point of care. Now she's doing it for animals.

AI Strategy

We use AI to build the network faster than anyone else can.

ScriptPaw is AI-powered at its core — from LLM-based clinical context targeting to automated campaign optimization. The platform gets smarter with every campaign flight.

Targeting

Clinical Context Engine

LLM reads anonymized clinical signals and serves the highest-relevance campaign per patient encounter in real time.

Optimization

Campaign AI Learning

Each flight teaches the platform. Rx lift data automatically reweights creative for the next campaign.

Partner Dev

AI-Powered Outreach

Every supply partner email and pharma brand pitch personalized by AI. A 2-person team moves like a 10-person org.

Data Product

Prescribing Intelligence SaaS

Anonymized prescribing data becomes a standalone product — the Google Analytics of veterinary medicine.
